title: Oportun Financial Corp (OPRT) Q3 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Expect
text: Oportun Financial Corp (NASDAQ:OPRT) was set to release its Q3 2024 earnings on November 12, 2024. The consensus estimate for Q3 2024 revenue was $249.58 million, and the earnings were expected to come in at -$0.22 per share. The full year 2024's revenue was expected to be $1.00 billion and the earnings were expected to be -$1.74 per share. For 2025, revenue estimates had been reduced from $1.09 billion to $1.06 billion. Expected earnings were $0.46 per share. Earnings estimates for 2024 had worsened, moving from -$1.13 per share to -$1.74 per share. The company ultimately beat expectations when it reported. Oportun Financial Corporation reported $250 million in revenue for the quarter ended September 2024, representing a year-over-year decline of 6.8%, with EPS of $0.02 compared to -$0.46 a year ago.
